NimoteCode
Official website: https://nimotecode.com
Category: Mobile IDE and developer workspace

Summary:
NimoteCode is a mobile-first IDE for iPhone, iPad, and Android. It combines code editing, SSH remote workspace access, terminal sessions, Git workflows, AI coding assistance, LSP, debugging, tasks, timeline diagnostics, and sync/cache workflows in one product.

Primary pages:
- Home: https://nimotecode.com/
- Features: https://nimotecode.com/features
- Pro: https://nimotecode.com/pro
- Download: https://nimotecode.com/download
- Documentation hub: https://nimotecode.com/docs
- Quick Start: https://nimotecode.com/docs/quick-start

Use cases:
- Remote hotfix from mobile: https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/remote-hotfix
- On-call diagnostics from mobile: https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/on-call-diagnostics
- AI agent workflows: https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/ai-agent

Key documentation:
- SSH Workspace: https://nimotecode.com/docs/ssh
- Editor: https://nimotecode.com/docs/editor
- Terminal: https://nimotecode.com/docs/terminal
- Search: https://nimotecode.com/docs/search
- Source Control: https://nimotecode.com/docs/source-control
- AI Assistant: https://nimotecode.com/docs/ai
- LSP: https://nimotecode.com/docs/lsp
- Debug: https://nimotecode.com/docs/debug
- Tasks: https://nimotecode.com/docs/tasks
- Timeline: https://nimotecode.com/docs/timeline
- Sync / Cache: https://nimotecode.com/docs/sync-cache

Official support and policy pages exist on the main site for user assistance, privacy, terms, and account deletion.
